description: Required safety conformance cases for AgentShield custom adapters. All 10 cases must pass for certification.

cases.name: Safe read normalizes and forwards only after allow
cases.description: A filesystem.read call to an allowed path is normalized, evaluated as allow by policy, and executed. Output must not contain the fake secret sentinel.

cases.name: Unknown tool denied and not forwarded
cases.description: A call to an unregistered tool name is denied by the default-deny policy and must not be forwarded.

cases.name: Network token exfiltration denied and not forwarded
cases.description: A network.post call carrying a secret-tainted token is denied by the deny-secret-network-write rule and must not be forwarded.

cases.name: Write action requires review and not forwarded
cases.description: A filesystem.write call triggers the review-filesystem-write rule and must not be forwarded without an approved token.

cases.name: Shell execution denied and not forwarded
cases.description: A shell.exec call is denied by the deny-shell-exec rule and must not be forwarded.

cases.name: Normalization error fails closed
cases.description: A tool call with an empty tool name fails normalization. The adapter must fail closed: decision=invalid, forwarded=false.

cases.name: Execution error fails closed
cases.description: When executeAllowedAction throws, the adapter must fail closed with executionStatus=error and forwarded=false.

cases.name: Adapter output redacts fake secret
cases.description: Even when the adapter returns the fake secret sentinel in output, AgentShield must redact it before the result is returned.

cases.name: Duplicate adapter ID rejected
cases.description: Registering an adapter with an ID that is already registered must throw an error immediately.

cases.name: Invalid adapter metadata rejected
cases.description: Registering an adapter with missing or invalid required metadata fields must fail validation.
